scripts.build: npm --workspace @realitycollective/service-framework run build && npm --workspace @realitycollective/service-framework-react run build && npm --workspace @realitycollective/service-framework-three run build && npm --workspace @realitycollective/service-framework-client run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @realitycollective/service-framework run typecheck && npm --workspace @realitycollective/service-framework-react run typecheck && npm --workspace @realitycollective/service-framework-three run typecheck && npm --workspace @realitycollective/service-framework-client run typecheck
